title: Europe Day 2026: let’s celebrate together
summary: Brussels, 5 May – On 9 May each year, Europeans celebrate the anniversary of the Schuman Declaration, the key moment which led to the creation of the EU as we know it today. To mark this special occasion, the European institutions will open their doors to the public on 9 May 2026, and we would […] T...
